opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My wrists and ankles are covered in these purple bumps that itch so deeply I feel like I'm going insane. Nothing I put on them helps.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden intensely itchy purple bumps on my wrists and ankles, no sleep for two days.

symptom_narrative.character: purple flat-topped bumps, deeply and intensely itchy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: maddening 'deep' itch out of proportion to the rash; no sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: insides of both wrists and front of both ankles
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching (new bumps appear along scratch lines)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lacy white patches inside the cheeks; new bumps where I scratch; no fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no new medications or illnesses reported

communication_style.typical_message_style: exhausted, focused on the relentless itch

objective_data_offered.value: clusters of firm purple flat-topped bumps on the insides of the wrists and front of the ankles, some in lines where scratched; fine white lacy lines on their surface; lacy white patches inside the cheeks
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; dermatoscopy/oral exam limited remotely
